name: Chickenless a La King
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pan, cook onions, green peppers, and mushrooms in 1/4 cup water for 10 minutes. Remove from heat.
2. Blend in flour.
3. Slowly stir in 3 cups soymilk (nut milk or rice), 1 cup water, and 2 tablespoons tamari.
4. Cook over medium heat, stirring almost constantly until the mixture boils and thickens.
5. Stir in pimiento.
6. Cook and stir for about 2 more minutes to heat the pimiento.
7. Serve hot over rice, whole grains, toasted bread, baked potatoes, or pastry puffs.
Instead of Chicken, Instead of Turkey, published by United Poultry Concerns, PO Box 59367, Potomac, MD 20859 (301)948-2406
